task_completion.description: Create the first page with the correct title and definitions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an ActivInspire slide containing the title 'Compound Probability' and text defining the terms 'Tree Diagram', 'Outcome', and 'Probability'.

task_completion.description: Draw a tree diagram representing two coin flips on the second page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an ActivInspire slide showing a binary tree structure with at least 6 connector lines representing two sequential coin flips (1 root splitting to 2 branches, which each split into 2 more branches).

task_completion.description: Label the tree diagram with correct outcomes and probabilities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels on the tree diagram including 'Heads' and 'Tails' on the branches with '1/2' probabilities, and final outcome labels 'HH', 'HT', 'TH', 'TT' with '1/4' probabilities.

task_completion.description: Create the third page with practice problems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an ActivInspire slide titled 'Practice Problems' containing at least two distinct probability-related questions.

task_completion.description: Save the flipchart to the specified directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' and the filename 'probability_tree_diagram.flipchart', or the ActivInspire window title bar displaying 'probability_tree_diagram.flipchart'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the ActivInspire application open with the agent interacting with its tools (text, shapes, connectors), rather than terminal windows generating XML files directly.

integrity.description: The tree diagram was drawn using application tools, not imported as a pre-made image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of individual text boxes, shapes, and connector lines being placed or selected in ActivInspire, rather than a single static image pasted from a web browser.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the ActivInspire 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog box being used, rather than terminal commands moving or renaming files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart saved at '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/probability_tree_diagram.flipchart'. Page 1 must contain the title 'Compound Probability' and terms 'Tree Diagram', 'Outcome', and 'Probability'. Page 2 must show a binary tree diagram with at least 6 connector lines, branch labels 'Heads' and 'Tails' (with '1/2' probability), and final outcomes 'HH', 'HT', 'TH', 'TT' (with '1/4' probability). Page 3 must have the title 'Practice Problems' and at least two questions.
